Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are given several tables and need to create an event log for process mining Steps 1 Well use order_id as the case ID

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will derive events from each table Orders Order Created Order Lines Item Picked for each line item Delivery Order Dispatched and Order Arrived Invoice Invoice Issued Payments Payment Received

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The table does not specify who made the payment We will use the payment_method as the resource for the payment event but note that it is not a person

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to map timestamps appropriately For each order we have multiple events and we must order them by timestamp

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will combine data by linking through order_id and for payments through invoice_id to order_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will enrich with resources We can join the resources table to get the resource name from the resource id

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order Created from Orders Item Picked from Order Lines Order Dispatched and Order Arrived from Delivery Invoice Issued from Invoice Payment Received from Payments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each row in Payments we find the corresponding invoice row to get the order_id We create a mapping from invoice_id to order_id

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We will have a fixed set of columns and for each event we fill in the ones that are relevant and leave the others blank

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must be cautious with the order of events we must sort by timestamp for each case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1001 Order Created then two Item Picked events then Order Dispatched then Order Arrived then Invoice Issued then Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1002 Order Created then two Item Picked events then two Order Dispatched events then two Order Arrived events then two Invoice Issued events then two Payment Received events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1003 Order Created then two Item Picked events then Order Dispatched then Order Arrived then Invoice Issued then Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1004 Order Created then Item Picked No delivery invoice or payment for order 1004 in the data

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1005 Order Created then two Item Picked events then Order Dispatched then Order Arrived then Invoice Issued then Payment Received

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now we have all events We will sort by Case ID and then Timestamp
